case_title: TYLER BAKER VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO (TREASURER) ET AL

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 100000745)
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF AUG-31-2016 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - NON-VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BAKER, TYLER AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO (TREASURER) TIDEWATER PACIFIC ADJUSTERS, LLC AS CALIFORNIA AGENTS FOR PRAETORIAN INSURANCE COMPANY DOES 1 TO 15, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR JUL-20-2016 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  APR-18-2016 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         JUN-27-2016
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO (TREASURER) ONLY; MATTER TO PROCEED AGAINST REMAINING DEFENDANTS (TRANSACTION ID # 100018800)
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF JUL-20-2016 CONTINUED TO AUG-31-2016 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT TIDEWATER PACIFIC ADJUSTERS, LLC AS CALIFORNIA AGENTS FOR PRAETORIAN INSURANCE COMPANY ONLY, CASE TO PROCEED AGAINST REMAINING DEFENDANTS AFER MOTION TO IDENTIFY AND DESIGNATE AETNA, ET AL. AS DOE DEFENDANTS (TRANSACTION ID # 100020888)
